title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build with AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Job Applications Platform
summary: JavaScript Mastery presents JobPilot, a full-stack job applications platform that demonstrates how to build production systems around AI agents in 2026. The workflow uses nine context files and five open-source agent skills to prevent agent drift while shipping real projects.
